directive.title: Neon DB schema setup with Drizzle ORM foundation

auditor.summary: The generated code provides a solid foundation for the Neon PostgreSQL schema with Drizzle ORM, but has several critical issues that prevent it from passing the acceptance criteria. The most critical issues are: (1) the seed.ts file was not generated due to truncation, (2) a circular dependency between companies.ts and users.ts will cause TypeScript compilation failures, (3) connection pool timeout configuration is missing, (4) audit log immutability rules are defined but never executed, and (5) no tests are provided to verify any of the acceptance criteria. The code structure and schema definitions are otherwise well-designed and follow Drizzle ORM best practices. However, the build cannot be accepted in its current state due to these blocking issues.

top_issues.description: Seed script file was not generated due to truncation. This is a critical missing file that is required for multiple acceptance criteria (2, 10, 12, 15).
Circular dependency: companies.ts imports './users' but users.ts imports './companies'. This will cause TypeScript compilation errors and may break drizzle-kit generation.
Connection pool configuration does not include connectionTimeoutMillis=2000. The neon() function is called without pool configuration options. This violates EQS §2.1 sub-2s budget enforcement.
